job_description:
• This person must assume the role of trusted advisor for driving innovative solutions forward while also improving business performance.
• You will discover customer business needs, analyze requirements, and ultimately position the best Salesforce multi-product solutions.
• Connect Experiences: Demonstrate through both executive-level and business-level software demos and rapid prototyping how connected experiences come to life.
• Proven experience working in a customer-facing role Good at explaining ideas and finding ways to keep people’s attention.
• Industry experience in Healthcare Payers, with an understanding of regulatory requirements, risk mitigation, and security (e.
• , HIPAA) or core industry concepts such as quoting, care management, utilization management, member experience, broker management, underwriting, and provider network management.
• Experience working with agentic code solutions (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Agentforce Vibes, etc)Salesforce Certifications (e.
• , Health Cloud) and/or previous experience as a solution/sales engineer for a CRM company or systems integrator.
